items.claim: Brandon Royval has sustained multiple concussions in recent fights.
items.quote: He's dealing with concussion issues. He got another concussion after the Manel Kape fight.

items.claim: Brandon Royval has a 43% striking defense rate.
items.quote: I think it's a 43% striking defense.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has no striking defense.
Paddy Pimblett is more durable on the feet than Benoit Saint Denis.
items.quote: I think Paddy's the more durable guy on the feet.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett is a better striker than Benoit Saint Denis.
items.quote: I think Paddy's even the better striker at this point.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is a better wrestler than Paddy Pimblett.
items.quote: I think BSD's obviously the better wrestler.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis frequently puts his neck in bad positions during grappling exchanges.
items.quote: he puts his neck in bad spots. He's submission over position.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett is a superior submission grappler to Benoit Saint Denis.
items.quote: I just think Paddy Pimblett's the much better submission grappler.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is capable of winning the first round against Max Holloway.
items.quote: I think maybe Conor can steal round one, maybe.
